text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I approach the training course, I spy Vodka talking to another
student.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, you and me—let's race fair and square! I don't need no head
start!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's been challenging the seniors to races left and right these
days... I wonder what's gotten into her.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Here we go, last corner! It's make or break time—and I'm gonna
caaatch uuup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, despite being in hot pursuit of her opponent, she fails to
close the distance.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Well, I'll let you have this one...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But it won't happen again! I'm gonna leave all you pace chasers in the
dust, so watch out! The soon-to-be world's coolest racer is comin'
after ya!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
(Aw yeah, I'm so cool! Now everyone knows that no matter how many
times I lose, I'm gonna get back up and keep goin'!)

text_block_list.name: Older Student
text_block_list.text:
Okay, whatever you say. You're cute when you're so hyped up.
Anyway, catch ya later.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hell yeah! Wait a sec... Aren't you intimidated at all? Like, I have
hidden powers, y'know! Hey!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, I wanna talk to you about something. Did you catch my
race just now?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I was all like, "I'm gonna leave you in the dust!" to be super cool,
but...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, wasn't that kinda lame? I bet all the seniors
think I'm just a kid with a big mouth.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, it sounds like something a clichéd villain would say. Like,
"You haven't seen the last of me!"

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You serious?! Oh man, it wasn't like this before I entered the
academy. For starters, losing in a race wasn't a thing for me...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But Tracen's got tons of talented folks, so of course I'd lose on
occasion. And every time it happens, I can't help but feel sore about
it.
choice_data_list:
What if you tried not saying anything
afterwards?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I suppose. I could give that a try. All right, lemme do a quick
practice sesh.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ahem, ahem... Okay, here I go. "Heh, looks like I lost. I accept my
defeat. See you later."

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: .........But I'm gonna get ya next time! I'll utterly destroy you!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh, I came off as an actual villain this time! How the hell do
people casually accept defeat and move on?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Sorry. I think I'm gonna go. This is pathetic...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As Vodka hurries off, I quickly follow behind her.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer. Didn't mean to worry you. It's just... I don't know what
being "cool" even is anymore.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's good that I'm facing tough opponents head-on, but I'm starting to
wonder if I should be dropping one-liners.
choice_data_list:
Do you always feel like you need to say
something?

Do you always feel like you need to say
something?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It just comes out on its own! I... got it from my pops. He'd always say
stuff like "you're lacking heart," or "looks like you're only second
best."

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
He was the one who taught me that it's cool to drop one-liners after a
match.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But if I don't win, it's kinda lame. I don't wanna be all talk and no
show. That's why I need your help, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Can you teach me what it actually means to be cool? You're the only one who knows how cool I really am.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Do you think you can help me grow even more?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! Just knowing that you're by my side makes me feel a lot
better! I'm gonna discover what it means to be genuinely cool. Oh
and...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I-I'll also need help to overcome my weakness. Y'know... whenever I
see lovey-dovey romantic stuff, I get shivers down my spine.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sayin' I'm embarrassed though! Don't you dare get me wrong.
You better not tell anyone else about this, or else I'll send ya flyin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before Vodka turns around and rushes off, I manage to catch a
glimpse of her flushed cheeks.
